description: Scatter plot showing Displacement in millimetres (mm) versus Time in days, accompanied by a linear regression trend line. The Y-axis, labelled "Displacement [mm]", ranges from -30 mm to 10 mm. The X-axis, labelled "Time [days]", ranges from 0 days to 60 days. Individual displacement measurements are plotted as blue dots. A red line represents the linear regression fit to these data points. The trend line starts at approximately 3 mm displacement at 0 days and decreases to approximately -22 mm displacement at 60 days, indicating a consistent subsidence or downward movement over the observed period. A specific data point around 22 days and 0 mm displacement is highlighted by a green circle. The chart includes a label "(c)" in the lower-middle section.
